para_trans: Administrative sanction under Special Amendment to the Yavluj Co. P. Dam in Panhala Taluka of Kolhapur District.
Government Certificate No: Proof-of-Year 2025 / (Q. 604/2025) / CC. V. (Works)
Reference: - Government Decision No. : Proof-of-Year 2025 / (Q. 604/2025) / CY (Works) D 21/05/2026.
The relevant Government decision is being amended as follows.
1) Title B of the Government Decision Taluka Panhala instead of Taluka Shahubadi mentioned in various paragraphs
2) Price details in Annexure with Government Decision - Taluka Bhudargad
The administrative sanction granted for this work is in the register of the Simvya (Works) Board at No.
This government certificate is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
